features.name: sdf_iopath_port_mismatch
features.description: Code should include an SDF IOPATH annotation with a port-to-port delay where the module's actual timing path differs from the annotated path

features.name: sdf_iopath_with_recrem_timingcheck
features.description: Code should include an SDF IOPATH combined with TIMINGCHECK containing RECREM constraint referencing clocked storage elements
features.snippet:
(IOPATH D Q (::148) (::148))
(IOPATH ENA Q (::147) (::147))
(IOPATH R Q () (::110))
(TIMINGCHECK
  (RECREM (posedge R) (negedge ENA) (::80) ())
  (SETUPHOLD (negedge D) (negedge ENA) (::100) (::100)))
